skills.name: Thrust
skills.description: Push the point of your weapon into enemies, performing a strong piercing attack.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Bash
skills.description: Inflict damage on an enemy with a powerful attack.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Gung Ho
skills.description: Increases physical attack damage through the power of determination.
skills.effect_text:
Physical Attack Damage + CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Pain Barrier
skills.description: Grants immunity from Knockdowns, Knockbacks and being Staggered. Grants temporary immunity to all removable status ailments except stuns, binds, immobility, curse, freeze and petrification after use. Also increases the chance of resisting status ailments for the duration of Pain Barrier.
skills.effect_text:
Pain Barrier duration: CaptionTime seconds
Immunity to status ailments: 3 seconds

skills.name: Bear
skills.description: Reduces incoming damage from enemies through the power of determination.

skills.name: Liberate
skills.description: Unleashes your power within to draw nearby enemies. You gain increased Threat from monsters with every attack for the duration of the buff.
skills.effect_text:
Threat increase: +500%
Duration: 30 seconds
Max. level 1

attributes.name: Shield Mastery: Swordsman
attributes.description:
* 10% of Weapon ATK is applied as the Physical Defense when equipping [One-handed weapon] with [Shield]

* (Value is applied both to the main and second slot)

attributes.name: Bash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Bash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Thrust: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Thrust] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Gung Ho: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Gung Ho]'s physical attack damage increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Bash: Knockdown
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Bash] are knocked down

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Provoke
attributes.description: * Increases threat values when attacking enemies by 1500% per attribute level

attributes.name: Bear: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Bear]'s incoming damage reducing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Liberate: Awaken
attributes.description: * Reduces the duration of [Liberate] to 12 seconds and increases damage to enemies by 50%

attributes.name: Liberate: Fortitude
attributes.description: * Reduces the duration of [Liberate] to 6 seconds and increases the incoming damage reduction effect by 50%

attributes.name: [Arts] Thrust: Charge
attributes.description: * Increases the cooldown of [Thrust] by 4, and dashes to your target and deals damage upon use.

attributes.name: [Arts] Thrust: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Thrust] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Bash: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Bash] by 1.25% per attribute level
